description_long: This is a modern, double-door refrigerator with a sleek, dark exterior finish and a bottom freezer compartment. The front features two vertical handles and an integrated water and ice dispenser on the left door, giving it a contemporary look. The sides and back are a deep, almost black color, likely mimicking a dark wood or metal panel. The refrigerator's surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting ambient light. The appliance is robust and boxy, with clean lines and a flat top that could support lightweight objects. No visible branding or control panel is present on the exterior, and the door seals are not visible from these views.
description: A modern, double-door refrigerator with a dark, glossy finish, bottom freezer, and integrated water/ice dispenser. It has sleek vertical handles and a smooth, boxy form.
description_view_0: Side view showing a flat, dark panel with no visible features or handles.
description_view_1: Front view displaying double doors, vertical handles, and a water/ice dispenser on the left door.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with a flat, dark panel and no visible features.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, flat, dark surface with no visible components or details.
attribute_door_handle_style: Vertical, protruding handles placed centrally on each door, extending most of the door height.
